programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: The contempt for life exhibited by serial killers makes people question their own safety; psychopaths and sadists rarely show regret or empathy for the lives they destroy.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: Scientists are involved in a never-ending quest to understand the vast universe the planet inhabits; it seems that for each answer science provides, even more questions arise.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: Whether ancient burial practices, like graves, tombs and cremations, can preserve the soul for eternity or bring the dead back to life.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: Can humans predict the future by use of prophets and dreams, if so, can humankind harness this knowledge to avoid future deadly events.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: Exploring the center of the Earth.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: For centuries, legends and eyewitness accounts have told of a massive, hairy creature that roams the forest on two legs.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: For thousands of years, mankind has been fascinated by the idea of creating mechanical servants to make our lives easier.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: There are many puzzling artifacts from around the world that challenge everything known about the technological capabilities of distant ancestors; some ancient objects are so mysterious they've spawned endless debate and theories.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: Stories of unidentified creatures living deep beneath the surface of oceans and lakes include sightings of giant sharks, prehistoric serpents, and even razor-toothed mermaids.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: Dreams have inspired humanity for thousands of years and in all this time, we have yet to answer one fundamental question: What is the purpose of dreams? From nightmares linked to unexplained deaths and more.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: Since the dawn of humanity, tales of monstrous creatures lurking in the shadows have sparked both fascination and fear; discussing the potential that these stories have elements of reality to them.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: Islands riddled with dark histories, unspeakable tragedy and the belief by locals that they are cursed.

programme.title: Rare US Army Silver
programme.desc: This is your LAST CHANCE to secure the first coin ever featuring a US Army Privy Mark at this low price! Graded PF70UCAM, this 2025 Army Privy Silver Eagle celebrates the 250th Anniversary of the US Army. Ranks among the lowest mintage of the series!

programme.title: Rare US Army Silver
programme.desc: This is your LAST CHANCE to secure the first coin ever featuring a US Army Privy Mark at this low price! Graded PF70UCAM, this 2025 Army Privy Silver Eagle celebrates the 250th Anniversary of the US Army. Ranks among the lowest mintage of the series!

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Amazing Facts With Doug Batchelor
programme.desc: Pastor Doug Batchelor reveals facts about biblical events and brings new insight to frequently asked questions in Christianity.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: In this weekly program, Dr. David Jeremiah delivers practical messages to the congregation at the Shadow Mountain Community Church in San Diego. Also featured is music from the Shadow Mountain Community Church Choir and Orchestra, as well as performances by musical guests that have included Steve Green and Charles Billingsley. Men and women who have been impacted by the Turning Point ministry also share their stories with viewers. During the month of December, "Turning Point" usually features special Christmas programming.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike makes deal after deal; Frank hits a snag with a straight-talking Wisconsin collector who won't move on prices.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike makes a big offer on a very rare vintage Edison invention; a mega stash of beer-related memorabilia stokes Frank's Oktoberfest mojo.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: At a gas station transformed into an eccentric home, Mike and Frank explore a collection that sends chills up their spines.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The guys go see a woman overwhelmed by an incredible inheritance, she opens the doors to a secret vault; they meet their match in an 80-year-old rebel who speeds a mini bike around his massive property.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike makes a mistake in Indiana; while the guys receive a warm reception from a carnie collector in Ohio, the pick brings an unexpected sting.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: When the guys get a lead on what could be Aerosmith's original tour van, they head out on a cross-country trek in search of the holy grail of rock 'n' roll relics.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: A super-sized Chicago machine shop leaves the guys breathless, while Danielle and Robbie search for curios at an Odd Fellows Home-turned-winery.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: In Illinois, Mike and Frank comb through a mind-blowing historic marina; in Kansas City, Danielle brokers a deal on the mother of all burlesque collections.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Dave go hog wild for a former Minnesota car dealership that's now home to scores of dusty projects and a one-of-a-kind miniature cruise ship.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo
programme.desc: From a legendary city swallowed by the jungle, to an underground metropolis stretching 18 levels deep, and even a forgotten pyramid from a lost civilization, sometimes the biggest mysteries on Earth are closer than we think.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo
programme.desc: From priceless treasure found inside a lost city, to an ancient manuscript hidden behind a wall, explores mysterious secrets lost deep inside various unseen chambers like tunnels, caves and burial sites.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo
programme.desc: From a live WWII bomb discovered decades later, to a Civil War cigar hiding secret orders, to a Viking sword unearthed by a child, these finds reveal how the remnants of war can resurface when least expected.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo
programme.desc: A forgotten manuscript in a dusty trunk; a priceless painting discovered in plain sight; a royal tomb hidden for millennia beneath the sands; these famous finds prove history's greatest treasures often resurface when least expected.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo
programme.desc: From a hidden cache of bones, to an ancient tomb shrouded in mystery and even a rare sports car dug up in a backyard; these eerie revelations prove that some secrets refuse to stay buried.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo
programme.desc: Some discoveries defy explanation, like fossilized vomit from the Jurassic era, a sewer blob with a pulse, even a long-lost toy discovered inside a man's lung. These freaky finds prove that reality can be stranger-and far creepier-than fiction.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There: Alien Edition
programme.desc: In this special edition series, journalist Tony Harris presents evidence of UFO sightings from around the globe; Tony and a team of experts will analyze said evidence and render a verdict on whether these videos prove that aliens exist or not.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo
programme.desc: Secrets of popes, rewritten laws and cities lost to the waves are divine discoveries that shake our beliefs and uncover mysteries.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo
programme.desc: Some discoveries defy explanation, like fossilized vomit from the Jurassic era, a sewer blob with a pulse, even a long-lost toy discovered inside a man's lung. These freaky finds prove that reality can be stranger-and far creepier-than fiction.

programme.desc: From a hidden cache of bones, to an ancient tomb shrouded in mystery and even a rare sports car dug up in a backyard; these eerie revelations prove that some secrets refuse to stay buried.

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo
programme.desc: Secrets of popes, rewritten laws and cities lost to the waves are divine discoveries that shake our beliefs and uncover mysteries.

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There: Alien Edition
programme.desc: In this special edition series, journalist Tony Harris presents evidence of UFO sightings from around the globe; Tony and a team of experts will analyze said evidence and render a verdict on whether these videos prove that aliens exist or not.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Historic Silver Set
programme.desc: Add the Set of 20 Truly Historic Morgan Silver Dollars in Brilliant Uncirculated condition to your numismatic collection today; with only about 1% of all Morgan Dollars grading in uncirculated condition, examples like these are Condition Rarities.

programme.title: Historic Silver Set
programme.desc: Add the Set of 20 Truly Historic Morgan Silver Dollars in Brilliant Uncirculated condition to your numismatic collection today; with only about 1% of all Morgan Dollars grading in uncirculated condition, examples like these are Condition Rarities.

Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Amazing Facts With Doug Batchelor
programme.desc: Pastor Doug Batchelor reveals facts about biblical events and brings new insight to frequently asked questions in Christianity.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: In this weekly program, Dr. David Jeremiah delivers practical messages to the congregation at the Shadow Mountain Community Church in San Diego. Also featured is music from the Shadow Mountain Community Church Choir and Orchestra, as well as performances by musical guests that have included Steve Green and Charles Billingsley. Men and women who have been impacted by the Turning Point ministry also share their stories with viewers. During the month of December, "Turning Point" usually features special Christmas programming.

programme.title: The UnXplained Special Presentation
programme.desc: Deep within the recesses of the US government archives are secrets that will never see the light of day; but thanks to eyewitness encounters and devoted research many odd events are being uncovered and re-examined.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The UnXplained Special Presentation
programme.desc: A look at what is to be learned from people who evade death, including those who can survive a plane crash in a remote jungle, nearly freeze to death in the wheel well of a trans-Atlantic flight, or are struck by lightning multiple times.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The UnXplained Special Presentation
programme.desc: Exploring if dark, powerful energies permeate the human world, or if it is all just myth and superstition.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The UnXplained Special Presentation
programme.desc: World War II was a large and deadly conflict; from 1939 until 1945, more than fifty nations engaged in harrowing combat, and while the Axis Powers were eventually defeated, plenty of mysteries emerged from the rubble.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The UnXplained Special Presentation
programme.desc: Most disappearances can be explained by either foul play or bad luck. However, there are some cases that defy conventional wisdom. How can a modern jetliner simply drop off radar screens? And why do so many people go missing in the state of Alaska? What really happened to a famous explorer who disappeared deep in the jungles of the Amazon? Could there be strange forces behind these vanishings?

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The UnXplained Special Presentation
programme.desc: An investigation into what drives certain people to deceive and execute outrageous and daring plots; a look into how some elaborate crimes, from elusive imposters disguised as foreign doctors or socialites, to dangerous killers.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The UnXplained Special Presentation
programme.desc: How people develop extraordinary abilities, like remote viewing or enduring extreme temperatures by using one's mind.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The UnXplained Special Presentation
programme.desc: Humanity has long been fascinated with the galactic worlds beyond our planet; analyzing what mysteries are yet to be solved about the surface of the Moon and what would happen to Earth if the Moon disappears; discussing if the impact craters and massive scar on Mars reveal a cataclysmic history on the barren Red Planet.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
